---
title: "RNN"
author: "Yun Tsing"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Preparation
```{r, echo = False}

library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(lubridate)
library(keras3)
library(tensorflow)

df <- read_csv('data/final_data.csv')
```

```{r}

predict_alpha_rnn <- function(df){

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      caldt = as.Date(caldt),
      year = year(caldt)
    ) %>%
    arrange(year, crsp_fundno) %>%
    drop_na()

  feature_names <- df %>%
    select(-alpha_ann, -crsp_fundno, -caldt, -year) %>%
    colnames()

  results_rnn <- list()

  years <- sort(unique(df$year))
  start_year <- min(years)
  initial_train_end <- 2019

  if(!(2019 %in% years)){
    stop("Dataset must contain year 2019 for initial training window.")
  }

  for (t in (initial_train_end + 1):max(years)) {

    train_full <- df %>%
      filter(year >= start_year & year <= (t - 1))

    test_data <- df %>%
      filter(year == t)

    if (nrow(test_data) == 0) next

    tune_years <- sort(unique(train_full$year))
    split_index <- floor(0.7 * length(tune_years))

    train_years <- tune_years[1:split_index]
    valid_years <- tune_years[(split_index + 1):length(tune_years)]

    train_tune <- train_full %>%
      filter(year %in% train_years)

    valid_tune <- train_full %>%
      filter(year %in% valid_years)

    X_train <- train_tune %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    y_train <- train_tune$alpha_ann

    X_valid <- valid_tune %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    y_valid <- valid_tune$alpha_ann

    # scale features
    scaler <- preProcess(X_train, method = c("center","scale"))
    X_train <- predict(scaler, X_train)
    X_valid <- predict(scaler, X_valid)

    n_features <- ncol(X_train)

    # reshape for RNN
    X_train <- array(X_train, dim = c(nrow(X_train),1,n_features))
    X_valid <- array(X_valid, dim = c(nrow(X_valid),1,n_features))

    # tuning grids
    units_grid <- c(16,32,64)
    dropout_grid <- c(0,0.2)
    dense_grid <- c(8,16)
    lr_grid <- c(0.001,0.0005)
    batch_grid <- c(32,64)

    best_mse <- Inf
    best_params <- list()

    for(u in units_grid){
      for(d in dropout_grid){
        for(dense_u in dense_grid){
          for(lr in lr_grid){
            for(batch in batch_grid){

              model <- keras_model_sequential() |>
                layer_lstm(
                  units = u,
                  dropout = d,
                  recurrent_dropout = d,
                  input_shape = c(1,n_features)
                ) |>
                layer_dense(units = dense_u, activation = "relu") |>
                layer_dense(units = 1)

              model |> compile(
                optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = lr),
                loss = "mse"
              )

              history <- model |> fit(
                X_train,
                y_train,
                epochs = 50,
                batch_size = batch,
                validation_data = list(X_valid,y_valid),
                callbacks = list(
                  callback_early_stopping(
                    monitor = "val_loss",
                    patience = 5,
                    restore_best_weights = TRUE
                  )
                ),
                verbose = 0
              )

              preds <- model |> predict(X_valid)

              mse <- mean((y_valid - preds)^2)

              if(mse < best_mse){
                best_mse <- mse
                best_params <- list(
                  units = u,
                  dropout = d,
                  dense = dense_u,
                  lr = lr,
                  batch = batch
                )
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }

    # refit using best parameters
    X_full <- train_full %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    y_full <- train_full$alpha_ann

    X_full <- predict(scaler, X_full)

    X_full <- array(X_full, dim = c(nrow(X_full),1,n_features))

    final_model <- keras_model_sequential() |>
      layer_lstm(
        units = best_params$units,
        dropout = best_params$dropout,
        recurrent_dropout = best_params$dropout,
        input_shape = c(1,n_features)
      ) |>
      layer_dense(units = best_params$dense, activation = "relu") |>
      layer_dense(units = 1)

    final_model |> compile(
      optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = best_params$lr),
      loss = "mse"
    )

    final_model |> fit(
      X_full,
      y_full,
      epochs = 50,
      batch_size = best_params$batch,
      callbacks = list(
        callback_early_stopping(
          monitor = "loss",
          patience = 5,
          restore_best_weights = TRUE
        )
      ),
      verbose = 0
    )

    X_test <- test_data %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    X_test <- predict(scaler, X_test)

    X_test <- array(X_test, dim = c(nrow(X_test),1,n_features))

    pred_rnn <- final_model |> predict(X_test)

    temp_rnn <- test_data %>%
      transmute(
        evaluation_year = year,
        crsp_fundno = crsp_fundno,
        predicted_alpha = as.numeric(pred_rnn)
      )

    results_rnn[[as.character(t)]] <- temp_rnn
  }

  rnn_df <- bind_rows(results_rnn)

  return(list(
    rnn_predictions = rnn_df
  ))
}
```

```{r}

result <- predict_alpha_rnn(df)

rnn_df <- result$rnn_predictions

```
